prompt: A high-end photorealistic lifestyle shot from a first-person perspective (POV) of a person holding a sleek futuristic smartphone, taking a photo of a gourmet dinner plate on a warm wooden table. The plate contains a vibrant salad and sliced meats. Above the plate, a subtle holographic teal and lime green interface glows, displaying abstract data charts and nutritional rings without text. The background is a cozy, premium kitchen at night with soft blue ambient neon lighting and a glimpse of a high-tech refrigerator. Cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, teal and orange color grading, sharp focus on the food and phone screen.
negative_prompt: text, words, letters, numbers, watermark, logo, QR code, brand name, distorted hands, extra fingers, blurry face, messy kitchen, low resolution, cartoon, illustration, signature
notes: Used a POV (first-person) angle to directly illustrate the 'photographing the plate' action mentioned in the text.
Incorporated the teal/green neon glow from the references as holographic UI elements to represent the calorie tracking.
Balanced the 'late night' theme with warm wood textures to keep the food looking appetizing and premium.
Requested 'abstract data' to avoid the AI generating garbled, unreadable text which would look unprofessional.
